theme.strategy: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity, Truth) mixed with Technical Precision.

dashboard.vibe: Operational command-center, dense data, high-contrast, authority

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist mixed with Data legibility. High-contrast typography hierarchy.

headings.description: Authoritative and structured. Banned: Inter, Roboto. Used for Hero headings, primary labels, dashboard big numbers.

body.description: Clean, technical, highly legible for complex data tables and AI chat responses.

mono.description: Used for data labels, VIN numbers, status tags, and score blocks.

rules: Semantic Color Tokens: Use color structurally. Red = Action/Hot Lead/Error, Green = Success, Neutral = Interface.
The 'Tinted Grey' Rule: Pure #000000 or #808080 is forbidden. Neutral greys must have a subtle blue/cool tint in dark mode.
Hover Contrast: Must explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white).
Data Colors: Apply distinct color bands to the 0-100 Lead Score metric (Hot > 80, Warm 60-79, Nurture 40-59, Low < 40).

dashboard.grid: Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gaps: tight (gap-4 or gap-6).
patterns: North Star Metric: Place the most critical metric (e.g., 'Hot Leads Awaiting Action') in the top-left quadrant (F-pattern scan).
Progressive Disclosure: Default view shows 5-9 core elements. Hide complexity (logs, deep settings) behind drill-downs or sliding panels.
Collapsible Sidebars: Minimize chrome. Sidebar defaults to icon-only on smaller desktop screens to maximize data real estate.
No jagged bottoms: Stretch widgets to fill grid rows using h-full.
Keyboard Awareness: Message list must push up so the expanding input remains visible without overlapping content.
Bottom-Sheet UI: Use bottom-sheets/drawers for history and appointment slot pickers instead of desktop-style sidebars.
Message Chunking: Break long AI replies into scannable chunks (max 60 words per block).
Tap Targets: Minimum 44x44 points for all buttons (Send, Date Select, Feedback).

dashboard_cards.name: GRID BORDERS (The Technical Look)
dashboard_cards.rules: Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout. Items have 1px solid borders (border-border). Flat solid surfaces. NO soft shadows. NO glassmorphism in the main data area (avoids visual muddying of metrics). Max 4px border-radius.

public_chat_header.name: GLASSMORPHISM (The Crystal Variant)
public_chat_header.rules: Used for sticky chat headers. backdrop-blur-xl or backdrop-blur-2xl with bg-white/70 or bg-white/80. 1px delicate inner stroke at the bottom (border-b border-black/5). Never transparent over scrolling content.

badges_and_scores.name: NEUMORPHISM (The Tactile Variant)
badges_and_scores.rules: Sharp 1px border combined with high contrast background color for status badges. e.g., bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20 text-red-500.

surfaces_and_visuals.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 inside containers. Exception: Data tables which require dense padding (p-2 or p-3).

rules: Forms/Inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized. Never native.
Data Tables: Shadcn Table. Must include multi-level filtering and sorting.
Charts: Shadcn chart components (Recharts). Stick to classic visualizations: Line (trends), Donut (≤3 variables), Bar (comparisons).
Avatars: Shadcn Avatar. Square avatars for vehicles/dealerships, circular for humans/AI.
Modals/Drawers: Shadcn Dialog for desktop, Shadcn Drawer (bottom sheet) for mobile chat flows.
chat_specific: Expanding Textarea: Use a text-area that auto-grows rather than scrolling horizontally.
Feedback Loop: Thumbs up/down inline with AI responses.

motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Mandatory hover states with explicit transition timing (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). Do not use 'transition: all'.
motion_and_interactions.chat_streaming: New messages must smoothly animate in (e.g., opacity and slight Y-axis translation). Paused auto-scroll if user scrolls up.
motion_and_interactions.data_loading: Use skeleton loaders for dashboard widgets instead of spinning wheels.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Explicitly check AI message text against bubble background.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (Send button, Appointment slots, Navigation links, Filter toggles) MUST have robust data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='chat-send-button').
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query. Add aria-live='polite' to chat stream container.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor icons for dense dashboards. Weight: Regular or Bold. Consistent sizing (16px, 20px, 24px).

dealership_building.description: Yellow cars displayed in a building's large glass window.
dealership_building.usage: Use as a background for the login/auth screen with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) to maintain high contrast.

used_cars_inventory.description: A row of cars parked in a parking lot.
used_cars_inventory.usage: Thumbnail image for the 'Inventory Match' feature in the Dashboard.

used_cars_inventory.description: Maroon vintage car parked in front of brick house.
used_cars_inventory.usage: Placeholder for a private seller's vehicle image in the Lead Detail view.

dealership_staff_avatars.usage: Avatar for the Dealership Manager / Sales Rep taking over the chat.
Avatar for a Dealership Sales Rep.

ai_avatar.usage: The avatar representing the AutoAcquire AI in the public seller chat.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp 1px borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add text-align: center to the root App class.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like robot, brain, lightbulb for icons. Use the specified Phosphor icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations. Static = dead.
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com, placehold.it, etc.). Always use the provided media URLs.
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx, or install if missing.
